mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM eb_circle_menu m right join eb_circle_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.id right join eb_circle_role r on rm.rid = r.id right join eb_circle_admin a on FIND_IN_SET(r.id, a.roles) where m.is_delte = 0 and r.`status` = 1 and a.id = #{uid} GROUP BY m.id

SELECT m.* FROM eb_circle_menu m right join eb_circle_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.id right join eb_circle_role r on rm.rid = r.id right join eb_circle_admin a on FIND_IN_SET(r.id, a.roles) where m.is_delte = 0 and r.`status` = 1 and m.menu_type != 'A' and m.is_show = 1 and a.id = #{uid} GROUP BY m.id
